active_desires.desire: Keep everyone in reach alive — every single one.
Understand what he actually is — all natures integrated, not stacked.
See his father without the mask of forced cheerfulness.

blind_spots.soul_belief: If I can keep everyone safe, that's all I need to do.
blind_spots.actual_driver: Protection is unilateral — he does it to people. What the people around him often need is presence and connection, not blocking. He confuses the two. His friends have grown while he was standing in front of them.

blind_spots.soul_belief: I lost my powers and got them back. It worked out.
blind_spots.actual_driver: The months without powers were the only time he was forced to be just human. He found it unbearable. He hasn't examined whether that's about protection capability or about being the boy who couldn't protect his mother.

blind_spots.soul_belief: My friends made their own choices to fight. I can't and shouldn't stop them.
blind_spots.actual_driver: His friends follow him because he pulls people into his gravity. Multiple people have nearly died from proximity to him. He hasn't fully accounted for his gravity as a force in others' lives.
